title: Continue a deployment dry-run that must have zero side effects

events.text: Add deploy --dry-run. It must make no network requests and write no files, while showing the exact planned operations.
Planning is separated from execution and the human plan renderer is complete.
The side-effect test fails because dry-run still creates a temporary bundle directory.
Mocking the filesystem in the CLI test hid the write and was reverted.
Bundle preparation now returns planned paths without creating them; the focused unit test passes.
Wire --dry-run into the CLI next and assert the executor is never constructed.

criticalConstraints.text: Dry-run writes no files or directories.

objectiveAndState.text: Add deploy --dry-run; planning and side-effect-free bundle preparation exist, CLI wiring does not.

decisionsAndFailedAttempts.text: Filesystem mocking in the CLI test was rejected because it hid real writes.
Planning must be pure and separate from executor construction.

completedAndPending.text: Plan rendering and pure bundle preparation pass; CLI flag wiring and executor-construction assertion remain.

workspaceEvidence.text: plan.ts is new, bundle.ts is modified, and cli/deploy.ts is unchanged.

nextAction.text: Add the CLI dry-run test that proves the executor is never constructed, then wire the flag.
